proof: machine-cold credentialless first-run of the released hotato package
reproducibility: This committed snapshot is the reproducible projection of the cold-path run: a clean re-run reproduces it byte-for-byte. Per-battery 'artifacts' (name + sha256_16) are content-addressable; 'volatile_artifacts' (attestation.json, provenance.json, contract.json) embed a signing timestamp, so only their name + size are recorded (no digest asserted). All paths are redacted to <sandbox> / <sandbox-home> / <tmp>. Wall-clock 'timing' is emitted per-run by scripts/cold_path_proof.py but omitted from this committed snapshot so the file reproduces; drop the per-battery 'timing' block from a fresh generator run to compare against this file.

arios tests/hotato/scenarios --audio tests/hotato/audio

  3. Render a shareable card from any candidate:
     hotato card hotato-sweep.json#1 --out candidate.svg

  4. Re-verify the demo failure contract in CI (or create your own from any candidate with `hotato contract create`):
     hotato contract verify contracts/
